allow: Bash(python -c "import csv, tempfile; from pathlib import Path; from mad_mario.logging.metrics import MetricLogger; d=Path\(tempfile.mkdtemp\(\)\); csv_path=d/'metrics.csv'; plots=[d/'reward.png', d/'length.png', d/'loss.png', d/'q.png']; logger=MetricLogger\([csv_path],[plots],reset=True\);\\nfor ep in range\(1,4\):\\n    logger.log_episode_metrics\(ep, ep*10, 0.1*ep, 0.2*ep\); logger.record\(ep, 0.5, ep*100, emit=\(ep==3\)\);\\nrows=list\(csv.DictReader\(open\(csv_path, encoding='utf-8'\)\)\); print\(len\(rows\)\); print\([row['episode'] for row in rows]\); print\(all\(p.exists\(\) for p in plots\)\)")

Bash(python -c "exec\('''import csv, tempfile\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\nfrom mad_mario.logging.metrics import MetricLogger\\nd = Path\(tempfile.mkdtemp\(\)\)\\ncsv_path = d / 'metrics.csv'\\nplots = [d / 'reward.png', d / 'length.png', d / 'loss.png', d / 'q.png']\\nlogger = MetricLogger\([csv_path], [plots], reset=True\)\\nfor ep in range\(1, 4\):\\n    logger.log_episode_metrics\(ep, ep * 10, 0.1 * ep, 0.2 * ep\)\\n    logger.record\(ep, 0.5, ep * 100, emit=\(ep == 3\)\)\\nrows = list\(csv.DictReader\(open\(csv_path, encoding='utf-8'\)\)\)\\nprint\(len\(rows\)\)\\nprint\([row['episode'] for row in rows]\)\\nprint\(all\(p.exists\(\) for p in plots\)\)\\n'''\)")
